content: Teal is a PhD student at NYU Tandon advised by Lisa Hellerstein. Teal received his B.A. in Mathematics and Computer Science from Middlebury College.

summary: We present quantum algorithms for various problems related to graph connectivity.
title: Applications of the Quantum Algorithm for st-Connectivity
